name: Genericglow In The Dark Paw Print Cat Collar Pink
shortDescription: The Generic Glow in the Dark Paw Print Cat Collar – Pink is a fun and functional accessory designed to keep your cat both stylish and safe. Adorned with glow-in-the-dark paw prints , it helps improve visibility in low-light conditions, offering extra protection during evening adventures. The adjustable design provides a snug yet comfortable fit, while the lightweight, durable material ensures long-lasting wear. Its bright pink color adds a cute, cheerful touch  perfect for cats with playful personalities.
description: Ensure your feline friend stays visible and stylish with our Generic Glow in the Dark Pawprint Cat Collar . Designed for both safety and comfort, this collar features a charming pawprint pattern that glows in the dark, making it perfect for evening walks or outdoor adventures. Key features include: Glow in the Dark Design : The collar is equipped with a special glow-in-the-dark material, allowing it to shine brightly at night and ensuring your cat is visible even in low-light conditions. Durable and Comfortable : Made from high-quality, lightweight nylon, this collar is built to withstand everyday wear while remaining soft and gentle on your cat’s neck. Adjustable Fit : Easily adjustable to fit cats of all sizes, ensuring a snug and secure fit. The collar is designed to grow with your pet, making it suitable for kittens and adult cats alike. Safe Breakaway Buckle : For your cat’s safety, the collar features a breakaway buckle that releases under pressure, reducing the risk of accidents or choking. Pawprint Pattern : A cute and timeless pawprint design that adds a fun touch while keeping your pet stylish. Whether your cat is indoors or exploring the great outdoors, this glow-in-the-dark collar helps keep them safe and visible while adding a touch of personality. Perfect for both day and night use, it’s an essential accessory for any cat owner!
